'''Ordrin Masst''' was an elderly [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who ran the landing field in [[Storrd Township]] on [[Seregar]]. He had two sons, [[Burdek Masst|Burdek]] and [[Nofft Masst|Nofft]], who ran the repair facility in Storrd Township.

==Appearances==
